Table	Create Table
attack_playbook_executions	CREATE TABLE `attack_playbook_executions` (
  `id` varchar(36) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `playbook_id` varchar(36) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `engagement_id` int(11) DEFAULT NULL,
  `current_phase` enum('pre_exploit','initial_access','execution','persistence','priv_escalation','lateral_movement','collection','exfiltration','cleanup','completed','aborted') COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pre_exploit',
  `current_step_index` int(11) DEFAULT '0',
  `step_results` json DEFAULT NULL,
  `started_at` bigint(20) NOT NULL,
  `completed_at` bigint(20) DEFAULT NULL,
  `executed_by` varchar(64) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `ape_status` enum('running','paused','completed','failed','aborted') COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT 'running',
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`) /*T![clustered_index] CLUSTERED */
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci
